albums.title: touhou artworks
albums.description: artworks featuring characters from Touhou Project

albums.title: first year of drawing
albums.description: the pictures from when I started art

artworks.title: Orin
artworks.notes: this is the earliest drawing in my pc, I decided to start art on that day and posted it on my pixiv account. a simple paper touhou piece inspired by Waita Uziga 's artstyle

artworks.title: Mokou
artworks.notes: this art was my first drawing of Mokou, the immortal girls are my favorite characters in Touhou

artworks.title: Going postal
artworks.notes: this is the postal dude from postal 2, dark humor old games and movie from back then

artworks.title: Mokou
artworks.notes: this is my first time using Krita, when I began to draw with my laptop and mouse

artworks.title: R-18G Mokou
artworks.notes: here is my first R-18G piece. it is very poor quality and inspired by Shimo's work, I was still learning my tools here

artworks.title: Bullet hell rebel
artworks.notes: a Touhou scene where Seija is getting arrested by the Yamazanadu. I don't know how but it seems I have spent 15 hours on Krita for this one

artworks.title: The two people beyond boundaries
artworks.notes: this is inspired by the touhou fan theory (紫=メリー説) which says that yukari is maribel but a thousand years older, I like it but I don't believe in it

artworks.title: Orange fumo
artworks.notes: this was my first pixiv profile picture, pretty terrible looking but that was the beggining for me

artworks.title: Koishi's passion
artworks.notes: another old attempt at drawing characters and bloody effect on my program

artworks.title: Yuyuko's ressurection
artworks.notes: this shows the ressurection of Yuyuko at the end of PCB, I remember enjoying drawing this picture

artworks.title: Mokou
artworks.notes: Mokou is calmly drinking, it's not like the fire would hurt her

artworks.title: 1998 Reimu
artworks.notes: this picture is the "old Reimu treatment" I suppose, one must notice a reference to Logan Paul

artworks.title: Wizard
artworks.notes: this was an attempt at drawing a scary comic face, the wizard's model is a v-tuber avatar

artworks.title: Mokou pfp
artworks.notes: this is my 2nd pixiv profile picture, I really love how this Mokou ended up looking

artworks.title: Ice fairy quiet life
artworks.notes: this is a small drawing where I tried to represent the misty lake of EoSD

artworks.title: エリック girl
artworks.notes: quick fan-art of a guro artist 's OC, I did this as a training on anatomy

artworks.title: Mokou
artworks.notes: this illustration of Mokou was done with a model in attempt to have more realistic proportions

artworks.title: Mamizou
artworks.notes: this mamizou art was a success at drawing perspective

artworks.title: Happy Mokou
artworks.notes: my first drawing of 2026! I wanted to make my Mokou look joyful for the new year

artworks.title: Ebola Chan
artworks.notes: this girl is the gijinka design of the ebola diseace, she is standing on hemoglobin. However I don't think this drawing was well-done

artworks.title: Kkhta Mokou
artworks.notes: this was an attempt at drawing the madness given to characters in KKHTA, sadly it looks awful in every points

artworks.title: Blowout meme
artworks.notes: this picture is a Touhou version I did of the old "blow-out soon" meme

artworks.title: BoWaP
artworks.notes: here is a drawing of the Yukari's spellcard that I really enjoy, the border of wave and particle. I love how cute the Yukari is and the danmaku was a little long but funny to make

artworks.title: Mokou
artworks.notes: the mirror behind is showing an alternative version of Mokou, it was an okay idea but ended up ugly

artworks.title: R-18G Mokou
artworks.notes: this is a redo of my r18g Mokou, this time way more sexy

artworks.title: The imperishable fight
artworks.notes: beautiful illustration where the immortal girls are fighting in the sky! also the begining of my first ever art challenge which is to draw Mokou for the days of immortality (=24th day of every month)

artworks.title: Cruel Marisa
artworks.notes: it was inspired by this parody https://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/sm44832761 with cookie star characters of Marisa and Parsee, I would give you this as a resource for cookie : https://yukkuri.shiteitte.net/wiki_pages/cookie_(touhou)/

artworks.title: Ariya
artworks.notes: this amazing character design is Ariya from FW, I used a pinterest reference (https://fr.pinterest.com/pin/281543726356358/) for her posture

artworks.title: Ressurection
artworks.notes: this represents the ressurection non-spell of Fujiwara no Mokou

artworks.title: Sanae with grub
artworks.notes: this tiny Sanae next to a grub is an old touhou jerk meme

artworks.title: Mokou meets Merry
artworks.notes: this is the scene of the 9th song of Changeability of Strange Dream (Touhou hifuu club story) where Merry who's getting more and more stuck in Gensokyo witnesses Mokou getting rid of a youkai in the bamboo forest

artworks.title: Hell or heaven
artworks.notes: this is inspired by Cirno's conclusion in Touhou 9 and a french meme scenery ; the fairy's fate is uncertain, she aknowledges that she might stop existing and fears it

artworks.title: Yorihime
artworks.notes: this drawing of Yorihime was inspired by Kam-S very old artstyle, an attempt to reproduce it

artworks.title: Shrine maiden duality
artworks.notes:
the duality between two shrine maidens
>Sanae thinks the lunarian war was a bad thing
; Reimu will do it again

artworks.title: Luna Child
artworks.notes: this is the result of trying a 3D-looking fairy, Luna Child is the only fairy you can live with, even tho I'd like Star Sapphire~ this art hurts my eyes

artworks.title: Guro girl
artworks.notes: a new simple guro scene here, I did 3 panels that shows the girl's death. despite the good anatomu my art were not as arousing as I wanted, causing a break with the nsfw attempts

artworks.title: Kitsune and Kuda-Gitsune
artworks.notes: this is an actual peak of my drawing, I managed to draw the two fox-youkai girls well and this illustration made me proud of my art knowledge at the time

artworks.title: Mechabre Suwako
artworks.notes: here is my first ever mechabre art, with this body horror Suwako concept. the frog is traced

artworks.title: Eternal existence
artworks.notes: the history is repeating itself in front of her... this picture have a sequel version for pixiv (id 142678106)

artworks.title: Apocalypse
artworks.notes: I wanted to draw every single PC-98 Touhou antagonist on the same picture, it feels like an insane bullet hell is about to happen

artworks.title: Marisa plays Touhou
artworks.notes: Marisa is sitting on a sofa and playing video game, I did this with the big-eyes anime style because at the time I decided to try this path looking for art's beauty

artworks.title: Clowpiece
artworks.notes: Clownpiece hitting her pose on the moon, there is a second version with way more revealing outfit (pixiv id 142973845)

artworks.title: Meowbah
artworks.notes: a quick fan-art of the meowbah character, who is a twitter troll 's OC

artworks.title: Cir-no-brain
artworks.notes: this funny illustration idea comes from this 2010 picture : https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/8767737

artworks.title: Doorbell chud
artworks.notes: that's a parody of the doorbell chud video but with Mokou instead, what a disturbing scene to look at

artworks.title: Koishi flicker
artworks.notes: this represents Koishi's sprite during her extra stage fight in Touhou 11

artworks.title: Sad kitten
artworks.notes: the loss of a kitten to Chen, sadly this ended up very odd looking due to my unusual rendering attempt

artworks.title: Above Eientei
artworks.notes: Mokou is flying over Eientei, ready to take her revenge! sadly I couldn't finish this illustration in time for my challenge and decided to ignore the background

artworks.title: The shrine tank
artworks.notes: this is an illustration with the SoEW shrine tank, I like how Touhou began with litteral tanks involved

artworks.title: Shion-pai
artworks.notes: quick nude illustration with Shion's breast- apparently it looks like an unnatural implant, I was focused on correct body rendering which is a success

artworks.title: Fight
artworks.notes: drawing of Kaguya and Mokou fighting, I did this as an OC for my subreddit, first on paper and then locked in on my PC

artworks.title: Yuuma Clark
artworks.notes: this is a scene from the backroom movie! I love my rendering on this one, but how did Yuuma ended up in the backrooms?

artworks.title: Gravital
artworks.notes: this is a re-evolved ruin haunter woman from all tomorrows putting her children into an early gravital, I heavily inspired myself of Zenith's art for this one and believe my art is now good looking. it is after this piece that I began the code of my website, delayed by my laptop's screen breaking which made it unusable for a whole week
